estimators.name: April Seno
estimators.title: Junior Estimator
personalization_hooks: Joined PCL Winnipeg as Junior Estimator in April 2023 — early-career, more receptive to new sub relationships.
Junior estimator role means she's likely doing a lot of the qty takeoff and trade-contractor outreach — exactly the seat that decides whether Ashrah gets bid invites for divisional packages.
PCL Winnipeg has multiple active estimator + senior estimator postings — team is growing; new hires need new sub relationships fast.
Hook: position Ashrah as 'easy to bid against' (clean takeoff format, fast turnaround on RFIs) — that solves a junior estimator's daily pain.

sources.claim: April Seno listed as Junior Estimator at PCL Construction, Winnipeg, since April 2023

fallback_contact.name: Kelly Wallace
fallback_contact.title: Vice President and District Manager — PCL
fallback_contact.rationale: VP/DM is the senior decision-maker locally. If estimator path doesn't open the door, a 'hello from a fellow Winnipeg owner' note to district leadership can route Ahmad to the estimating chief.

needs_review_flags: April Seno's title is 'Junior' Estimator — she may not be the bid-list decision-maker. Goal: get on her radar so she nominates Ashrah upward.
Identify and confirm PCL Winnipeg Chief Estimator name in a follow-up pass — likely a Gold Seal CE.
PCL is the largest GC on this list — high-value target.
